candidateRejected.title: Async ingest path canonicalization TOCTOU
candidateRejected.reason: The queued path is canonicalized before enqueue, and the downstream memory_save handler re-validates the file path and canonical index scope before indexing.
evidence: .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/memory-ingest.ts:198-215 resolves symlinks and only queues allowed roots.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/memory-save.ts:3187-3197 validates and canonicalizes the direct save path before accepting an indexable memory file.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/memory-save.ts:2850 parses the validated file through the normal indexing path.

candidateRejected.title: Retention sweep excludes active expired rows with tombstones enabled
candidateRejected.reason: Flag-on soft-delete tombstone retention intentionally targets the purgeable tombstone partition, while the default flag-off path still reaps active expired rows.
evidence: .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/lib/governance/memory-retention-sweep.ts:143-170 selects the purgeable tombstone partition only when the flag and deleted_at are present.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/ENV_REFERENCE.md:93 documents soft-delete tombstones as default OFF and tied to purgeable retention partition.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/memory-retention-sweep.vitest.ts:115-169 covers default active-row reaping and flag-on purgeable tombstone selection.

candidateRejected.title: Cancelled index scan writes last_index_scan cooldown
candidateRejected.reason: The scan lease/cooldown is explicitly a coalescing and race-prevention mechanism; cancellation releases the lease through the same completion path and has direct regression coverage.
evidence: .opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/handlers/memory-index.ts:1483-1494 always releases the lease in finally.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/core/db-state.ts:554-570 documents and implements completion by writing last_index_scan and clearing scan_started_at.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/tests/handler-memory-index-scan-jobs.vitest.ts:419-444 asserts cancellation releases the lease and prevents file indexing.
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/changelog/v3.0.1.3.md:26-28 documents the atomic lease/cooldown as intentional anti-overlap behavior.
